case_title: NATE, THOMAS D. VS LE SALON, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $620.00 FILED BY NATE, THOMAS D. AS TO DEFENDANT LE SALON, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LE SALON, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATE, THOMAS D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LE SALON, INC. $620.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $668.00, DISMISS AS TO DEFENDAT HOFFMAN, BEAR-DOG WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO THOMAS D. NATE RETURNED--NO REASON GIVEN
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LE SALON, INC.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $780.92 AS TO DEFENDANT LE SALON, INC.
